commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 6:7 Now it was in the heart of David my father to build a house for the name of the LORD God of Israel. Douay Rheims 1609 And the Priests stood in their offices: and the Levites with the instruments of the songs of our Lord, which David the king made to praise our Lord: Because his mercy is for ever, singing (a) the hymns of David by their hands: moreover the Priests sounded with Trumpets before them, and all Israel stood. (a) As the Temple was the special place of prayer, chosen by God: v. so special Hymns Psalms and other set forms of blessing are more grateful to God, and more effectual to his servants.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
